articles.title: Data Centers’ Next Hurdle: Winning Public Trust and Social License
articles.description: The industry faces a “public legitimacy problem”: winning social license and trust is now as essential to approvals as securing megawatts and permits.

articles.title: AI’s Next Data Center Challenge: Scaling Memory for the Inference Era
articles.description: AI inference needs scalable memory, not just compute. CXL decouples the two, letting data centers scale memory independently and avoid overbuying expensive processors.

articles.title: Why “reprogramming” is the buzziest approach to reversing aging right now
articles.description: Earlier this week, Life Biosciences, a biotech company focused on reversing age-related diseases, announced that it had dosed its first volunteer. articles.title: Google Cloud Disruptions Continue After India Data Center Fire
articles.description: Google has rerouted traffic after a Delhi data center fire, but customers across Indian metros may still experience latency and packet loss.
